# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:latest as base

RUN apk --no-cache add \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    jq \
    openjdk:8-jre-alpine \
    postgresql \
    redis

FROM alpine:latest as web

COPY base /app
WORKDIR /app/base
RUN apk --no-cache add build-base
RUN ln -s /usr/src/alpine/usr/lib/jvm/openjdk8 /usr/local/openjdk

WORKDIR /app/web
COPY your_web_server_jar_file.jar .
EXPOSE 80
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "your_web_server_jar_file.jar"]

FROM alpine:latest as api

COPY base /app
WORKDIR /app/base
RUN apk --no-cache add build-base
RUN ln -s /usr/src/alpine/usr/lib/jvm/openjdk8 /usr/local/openjdk

WORKDIR /app/api
COPY your_api_server_jar_file.jar .
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "your_api_server_jar_file.jar"]

FROM alpine:latest as db

RUN apk --no-cache add postgresql
RUN initdb -D /var/lib/postgresql/data
EXPOSE 5432
CMD ["pg_ctl", "start"]

FROM alpine:latest as redis

RUN apk --no-cache add redis
EXPOSE 6379
CMD ["redis-server"]
